Hero.headline: Your systems. Your data. Smarter operations.
Hero.subheadline: We build AI agents that work with your existing infrastructure — connecting ERPs, CRMs, and operational data to automate what's slowing you down.
Hero.eyebrow: Operational AI for the systems you already run

Problem.title: Sound familiar?
items: Your team wastes hours finding information across 4 different systems
Incidents take too long to diagnose because the data is scattered
You have the data. You just can't act on it fast enough.

diagnosis.name: Strategic AI Diagnosis
diagnosis.desc: We spend 2–3 weeks inside your operations, map your systems, and identify exactly where AI agents will have the highest impact. You get a concrete roadmap — not a generic report.

implementation.name: Agent Implementation
implementation.desc: We build and deploy AI agents tailored to your systems. From customer support agents that pull live data from your ERP, to NOC agents that correlate network alerts and pinpoint failures before your team does.

retainer.name: Ongoing Partnership
retainer.desc: After deployment, we stay. We improve the agents, add new use cases, and make sure the system keeps working as your business evolves.

items.title: Telecoms / ISPs
items.body: A customer calls. The agent identifies them instantly, pulls their contract details from the ERP, checks active tickets, and cross-references network status in their area — all before a human agent picks up the phone.

items.title: NOC / Infrastructure
items.body: Instead of your team manually correlating alerts across 6 dashboards, an AI agent monitors telemetry in real time, identifies anomalies, and surfaces the likely root cause with supporting data.

items.title: Internal Operations
items.body: Quotes, contracts, approvals, onboarding — the paperwork that slows everything down. Agents that process documents, extract relevant data, and route it to the right place automatically.

items.title: Contact Centers
items.body: AI agents that handle tier-1 queries at scale, escalate intelligently to human agents with full context already loaded, and learn from every interaction.

HowWeWork.title: How we work
HowWeWork.subtitle: Five phases. No black boxes. You see everything.

phases.title: Map
phases.body: We spend 2–3 weeks inside your operations. We audit your systems, data flows, and team workflows. We find the quick wins and the real transformation opportunities. You get a prioritised roadmap with estimated ROI — not a generic slide deck.

phases.title: Architect
phases.body: We design the agent system: what each agent does, how they communicate, what data they access, and how they're governed. We pick the right models — cloud, on-premise, or hybrid — based on your data sensitivity and budget. You approve the architecture before we write a single line of code.

phases.title: Build
phases.body: Iterative development with weekly demos. Multi-agent orchestration with built-in quality gates. Integration with your existing systems — ERP, CRM, ticketing, whatever you run. You see progress every week, not just at the end.

phases.title: Deploy
phases.body: Controlled rollout: shadow mode first, then pilot with a small team, then production. We train your people, set up monitoring, and make sure everything works before we step back.

phases.title: Evolve
phases.body: We stay. The agents improve based on real data. We identify new use cases proactively. Agent memory accumulates context over time — your system gets smarter the longer it runs. Monthly impact reports keep you informed.

Technology.title: What's under the hood
Technology.subtitle: We don't just plug in APIs. We build the infrastructure that makes AI agents reliable at scale.

items.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration
items.body: One agent can answer a question. A team of agents can run an operation. We build systems where specialised agents collaborate — each with its own role, capabilities, and quality gates. Think of it as a managed team that works 24/7 and never drops context.

items.title: Agent Memory
items.body: Most AI systems start from zero every session. Ours don't. Our agents maintain persistent memory across interactions — they remember your customers, your processes, and the decisions made last week. This isn't just a nice feature. It's the difference between a demo and a production system.

items.title: Governed AI
items.body: Every agent action passes through quality gates. Human-in-the-loop where it matters. Full audit trail for compliance. We don't "deploy and pray" — we build systems you can trust and explain to your board.

items.title: Infrastructure-Native
items.body: We don't outsource the hard part. 18 years in systems engineering and 4 years inside AWS means we own the full stack — from model selection to networking to deployment. Your data stays where you want it.

Pricing.title: Pricing that shares the risk
Pricing.body:
We don't believe in charging $200K for a system that might not work.

Our pricing is hybrid: a predictable base for the work we do, plus a variable component tied to the results we deliver. If the agents save you money, we share in that. If they don't, you're not stuck with a massive bill and a shiny demo that nobody uses.

tiers.name: Discovery & Assessment
tiers.desc: Operational audit, systems mapping, AI opportunity identification, prioritised roadmap with ROI estimates.

tiers.name: Agent Implementation
tiers.desc: Custom agent development, multi-agent orchestration, system integration, quality gates, controlled deployment.

tiers.name: Ongoing Partnership
tiers.desc: Continuous improvement, new use cases, agent memory enrichment, monthly impact reports, proactive optimisation.

Pricing.cta: Every engagement starts with a free 30-minute call.

About.title: Why Valkeron
About.body:
Most AI consultancies will sell you a chatbot and call it transformation.

We come from infrastructure. We've spent years building and running complex systems — networks, cloud architecture, enterprise software at scale. We know what it takes to make things actually work in production, not just in a demo.

Valkeron was built on a simple principle: AI should work with what you already have. Not replace it. Not require a 12-month migration project. Just connect, automate, and deliver results.

We work with a small number of clients at a time. That means you get direct access to the people who actually build your solution — and a partner who understands your business before writing a single line of code.
differentiators: 🔧 18 years in systems + 4 years inside AWS
🔒 Governed AI with quality gates and audit trails
💰 Outcome-aligned pricing — we share the risk
👤 Direct access to the builders, not account managers

Contact.title: Ready to see what's possible?
Contact.subtitle: Book a 30-minute call. We'll tell you honestly whether AI agents make sense for your operation — and if they do, exactly where to start.

fields.name: Name
fields.challenge: What's the biggest operational challenge you're facing right now?

Blog.description: Practical thinking on AI implementation, automation, and what actually works in the real world.
